---
applyTo: "src/app/**/*.tsx,src/components/**/*.tsx,src/app/globals.css"
description: "Use when editing UI and styling for the application; preserve the retro Japanese government portal look and form/certificate contrast."
---

# Frontend Style Instruction

## Required visual direction
- Keep deliberate retro office-system aesthetics.
- Avoid modern minimal SaaS styling.
- Use strong borders, table forms, and embossed buttons.

## Form area
- Prioritize readability over whitespace.
- Keep labels and helper notes explicit.
- Use annotation tone with short `※` notes.

## Certificate area
- Treat certificate as separate visual mode.
- Use serif typography and paper-like texture.
- Keep stamp and official formatting visible in mobile and desktop.

## Responsiveness
- Mobile must preserve identity, not collapse into generic card UI.
- Ensure download target region remains fully visible and unclipped.
